DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-12-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Henry Clark McKellar, in propria pesona, plaintiff and opposing parTy appeared on his own behalf.

The tentative ruling was adopted as the order of the court: Defendant Royal Garrison's Demurrer SUSTAINED with leave tot amend. No opposition filed. (AJR) Susan Crozier CSR# 4761
